---
title: "André Batista"
subtitle: "Ph.D. Candidate · PPGEE-UFMG"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: assets/images/bio-photo.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:andre-costa@ufmg.br
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/andre-batista
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=a00NW34AAAAJ&hl=pt-BR
    - icon: file-earmark-text
      text: CV Lattes
      href: http://lattes.cnpq.br/2956055711847042
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/andrecbatista
    - icon: building
      text: ORCS Lab
      href: https://orcslab.github.io/
---

Ph.D. candidate at the Graduate Program in Electrical Engineering, Universidade Federal de Minas Gerais (Brazil).

Member of the Computer Aided Design and Optimization Research Group (GOPAC/UFMG) and the Operations Research and Complex Systems Laboratory ([ORCS Lab/UFMG](https://orcslab.github.io/)).

Research areas: Optimization, Evolutionary Computing, Computational Electromagnetism, Inverse Problems, and Microwave Imaging.
